scope: MapGen Studio dev target and Vite watch topology
forbids: root dev aliases, package daemon watcher scripts, dev target topology drift, or generated/deploy outputs triggering Vite reloads
why: Studio dev execution topology is structural task authority and should not live in package tests.
remediate: Keep Studio dev orchestration in Nx project targets and keep generated/deploy outputs ignored by Vite watch.
message: MapGen Studio dev runner topology drifted.
